records.display_name: Upcoming events 2026

payload.claim_text: 2026 events include the Tunnel to Towers 5K, New York City Marathon, Five Boro Bike Tour, major sporting events, the 250th anniversary of the signing of the Declaration of Independence, and six-week FIFA World Cup
payload.description: Upcoming events requiring coordination from MTA Bridges and Tunnels

records.raw_text: In addition to recurring events such as the Tunnel to Towers 5K, New York City Marathon, Five Boro Bike Tour, and major sporting events, next year will include the 250th anniversary of the signing of the Declaration of Independence and six-week FIFA World Cup

records.display_name: CBD Tolling Program awards

payload.claim_text: The Central Business District Tolling Program has already earned five international, national, and regional awards
payload.statement: CBD Tolling Program earned five international, national, and regional awards

records.raw_text: The program has already earned five international, national, and regional awards

records.display_name: CBD Tolling Program results

payload.claim_text: The CBD Tolling Program has results: reduced congestion, fewer collisions, and increased transit ridership

records.raw_text: reduced congestion, fewer collisions, and increased transit ridership

records.display_name: Safety reporting initiatives

payload.claim_text: Monthly and quarterly facility-specific safety reports identifying injury causes and trends, compliance findings, and site-specific safety initiatives are issued. Environmental, Health and Safety staff have instituted weekly safety walks and monthly safety committee meetings with each facility.
payload.description: Safety reporting and meeting initiatives at MTA Bridges and Tunnels facilities

records.raw_text: monthly and quarterly facility-specific safety reports identifying injury causes and trends, compliance findings, and site-specific safety initiatives are issued.
